metadata.title: ReviewAware — Get more Google reviews automatically
metadata.description: ReviewAware sends review requests after every completed job so you earn more 5-star reviews without extra work.

hero.subtitle: Automatically send review requests after every completed job so your business consistently earns more 5-star Google reviews.
hero.reassuranceLine: Setup takes 5 minutes • No credit card required • Cancel anytime
hero.socialProofLine: ★★★★★ Trusted by service businesses growing their online reputation

industryStrip.subtitle: Roofers, contractors, and home service companies use ReviewAware to grow their online reputation.

problem.title: Most Happy Customers Never Leave Reviews Unless You Ask.
problem.item3: Businesses have no consistent follow-up system

builtForService.title: Built for Service Businesses
builtForService.subtitle: ReviewAware is designed for businesses that complete jobs every day.
builtForService.intro: Once a job is finished, ReviewAware automatically sends a review request to the customer.

solution.title: Automated Review Requests That Run After Every Job

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1: Add your customer or import jobs.
howItWorks.step3: ReviewAware automatically sends the review request.

whyReviewAware.title: Why Service Businesses Use ReviewAware
whyReviewAware.card1Text: Automatically request reviews after every completed job so more happy customers share their experience online.
whyReviewAware.card1Sub: Businesses that actively request reviews typically generate 3–5× more customer responses.
whyReviewAware.card2Text: Even when customers don’t leave a public review, they can still share feedback about their experience.
whyReviewAware.card2Sub: Identify service issues early and improve technician performance and customer satisfaction.
whyReviewAware.card3Text: Address customer concerns before they become negative public reviews.
whyReviewAware.card3Sub: Resolve issues privately while maintaining a strong public reputation.

reviewsImproveService.title: Reviews Improve Service — Not Just Ratings
reviewsImproveService.body1: Not every customer leaves a 5-star review.
reviewsImproveService.body2: But every review request gives you valuable feedback about your business.
reviewsImproveService.body3: Identify problems with technicians, scheduling, or communication before they damage your reputation.

features.title: Everything You Need to Grow Reviews
features.f5: Works on any phone, tablet, or computer — no app required.

screenshots.title: Your Review Pipeline in One Place
screenshots.subtitle: See how dashboard metrics, jobs, QR assets, and review emails work together in one workflow.
screenshots.callout1Hint: See status and volume at a glance
screenshots.secondarySub: Jobs, printable QR designs, and the email your customers receive.

reviewResults.title: Real Results from Automated Review Requests
reviewResults.footnote: Based on common review-request and reputation-management benchmarks.
reviewResults.stat1Text: Businesses that consistently ask customers for reviews receive dramatically more responses than those that do not.
reviewResults.stat2Text: Online reviews strongly influence which local businesses customers choose.
reviewResults.stat3Text: Businesses with more recent positive reviews appear more credible to potential customers.

outcomeTimeline.title: What Happens After You Start Using ReviewAware
outcomeTimeline.step1Body: Connect your Google review link and add your first completed job.
outcomeTimeline.step2Body: ReviewAware begins automatically sending review requests to customers.
outcomeTimeline.step3Body: Your business starts receiving more consistent customer reviews and feedback.
outcomeTimeline.step4Body: Your growing review profile strengthens your online reputation and helps attract new customers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need technical skills to use ReviewAware?
faq.a1: No. If you can send email or mark a job complete, you can use ReviewAware.
faq.q2: Does this work with Google reviews?
faq.a2: Yes. Lite includes Google plus one additional platform you choose.
faq.a3: Yes. There is no long-term contract — cancel whenever you like.
faq.a4: ReviewAware can send gentle reminder emails if a customer has not clicked your review link yet.
faq.a5: Plus is coming soon. Join the waitlist to get notified when SMS and advanced tools launch.

privacyPage.metaDescription: How ReviewAware collects, uses, and protects your information.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: ReviewAware (“we,” “our,” or “us”) respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and share information when you use our website and services.
privacyPage.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly (such as name, email, business details, and billing information when applicable), information generated when you use the service (such as jobs, review requests, and usage logs), and technical data (such as device type, browser, and approximate location from IP address).
privacyPage.s2Body: We use information to provide and improve the service, communicate with you, process payments, secure our systems, comply with law, and send product updates you can opt out of where allowed.
privacyPage.s3Body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who assist our operations (hosting, email delivery, analytics) under strict agreements, when required by law, or in connection with a business transfer such as a merger.
privacyPage.s4Body: We retain information as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal obligations. We use industry-standard safeguards, though no method of transmission or storage is completely secure.
privacyPage.s5Body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or export your data, or to object to certain processing. To exercise these rights or ask questions, contact support@reviewaware.com.

termsPage.metaDescription: Terms governing your use of ReviewAware’s website and services.
termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By accessing or using ReviewAware’s website and services, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
termsPage.s1Body: ReviewAware provides tools to request and manage customer reviews and related workflows. Features may change over time; we will provide reasonable notice of material changes where appropriate.
termsPage.s2Body: You must provide accurate registration information and keep your credentials secure. You are responsible for activity under your account. You must have authority to act on behalf of your business where applicable.
termsPage.s3Body: You agree not to misuse the service, including sending spam, violating applicable laws, infringing others’ rights, or attempting to access systems without authorization. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
termsPage.s4Body: Paid plans are billed as described at signup. Trials and cancellations follow the terms presented in the product at purchase. Taxes may apply where required.
termsPage.s5Body: The service is provided “as is” without warranties to the fullest extent permitted by law. To the maximum extent permitted, ReviewAware is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability for any claim related to the service is limited to the fees you paid us in the twelve months before the claim.
